ddls:
CREATE TABLE "markets" (
  "market_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market */,
  "market_name" TEXT /* Name of the market */,
  "exchange" TEXT /* Stock exchange where the market is located */,
  "location" TEXT /* Geographic location of the market */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the market */,
  "open_time" TEXT /* Opening time of the market */,
  "close_time" TEXT /* Closing time of the market */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the market operates */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("market_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stocks" (
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock */,
  "stock_symbol" TEXT /* Symbol of the stock */,
  "stock_name" TEXT /* Name of the stock */,
  "market_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the market where the stock is traded */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector of the company */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry of the company */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the company */,
  "ipo_date" TEXT /* Date of the initial public offering */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stocks_market_id FOREIGN KEY ("market_id") REFERENCES markets ("market_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "prices" (
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each price record */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock the price record belongs to */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the price record */,
  "time" TEXT /* Time of the price record */,
  "open" REAL /* Opening price of the stock */,
  "high" REAL /* Highest price of the stock */,
  "low" REAL /* Lowest price of the stock */,
  "close" REAL /* Closing price of the stock */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Trading volume of the stock */,
  "adjusted_close" REAL /* Adjusted closing price */,
  "volume_weighted_average_price" REAL /* Volume-weighted average price */,
  "change" REAL /* Change in price from the previous day */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_prices_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trades" (
  "trade_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trade */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock the trade belongs to */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the trade */,
  "time" TEXT /* Time of the trade */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of trade (buy or sell) */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Number of shares traded */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the trade */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who executed the trade */,
  "broker_id" INTEGER /* ID of the broker or trading platform used */,
  "commission" REAL /* Commission charged for the trade */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trade_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trades_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trades_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (trader, analyst, or admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytical_models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the model */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the model */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the model was created */,
  "last_updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the model was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytical_models_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model that produced the result */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock the result belongs to */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the result */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the model (e.g., predicted stock price, market trend) */,
  "confidence_score" REAL /* Confidence score of the model's prediction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_results_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_results_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES analytical_models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "risk_management" (
  "strategy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each strategy */,
  "strategy_name" TEXT /* Name of the strategy */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the strategy */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the strategy */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the strategy was created */,
  "last_updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the strategy was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("strategy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_risk_management_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "strategy_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result */,
  "strategy_id" INTEGER /* ID of the strategy that produced the result */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock the result belongs to */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the result */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the strategy (e.g., profit/loss, stop-loss triggered) */,
  "confidence_score" REAL /* Confidence score of the strategy's result */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_strategy_results_strategy_id FOREIGN KEY ("strategy_id") REFERENCES risk_management ("strategy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_strategy_results_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "news_articles" (
  "article_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each article */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the article */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the article */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the article */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the news article */,
  "author" TEXT /* Author of the news article */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL of the news article */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("article_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "article_sentiment" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis */,
  "article_id" INTEGER /* ID of the article being analyzed */,
  "sentiment" TEXT /* Sentiment of the article (positive, negative, neutral) */,
  "confidence_score" REAL /* Confidence score of the sentiment analysis */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_article_sentiment_article_id FOREIGN KEY ("article_id") REFERENCES news_articles ("article_id")
)
